name: Zootopia: Your Story, Your Legacy (open world) V1 Limitless
description: Step into the vibrant world of Zootopia after the events of the movie! This interactive storytelling experience invites you to craft your own tales in a city where predators and prey live in harmony. Meet familiar characters like Judy Hopps and Nick Wilde, explore iconic locations like Tundratown and Sahara Square, and face new challenges unique to this evolving metropolis. Your decisions will determine the fate of your story! Please leave comments to help improve.
creator: Mika_chan~
